Overview

Where coastal charm meets refined indulgence

True indulgence is not only tasted, but deeply felt.

Set against the serene backdrop of the Revdanda–Korlai shore, The Seascape pairs elegant ambience and attentive hospitality with the unhurried rhythm of the Konkan coast. Every corner of the property — from the tropical gardens to the sea-facing terraces — is designed to slow your pace and refresh your senses.

Stay a weekend or a week; you'll leave with sand still in your bag and the tide somewhere in the back of your head.

Discover Our Rooms →
Accommodations

Rooms & Suites

Six categories, each holding a different distance from the water.

Signature Suite

Open to Sky Private Pool

Modern and spacious, with a king-size bed, exquisite sea view, and a Bali-style bathroom — the plunge pool has nothing but sky for a ceiling.

Open patio · Bali bathroom · Smart TV · Floating breakfast on request
Pool Suite

Close to Sky Private Pool

Perfect for longer stays — a living room, dedicated study area, and upgraded amenities around your own sheltered pool.

Open patio · Study area · Sofa-cum-bed · Floating breakfast on request
Romantic

Bath-Tub Room with Sea View

Top-tier comfort with a deep soaking tub facing the sea — a cosy, romantic ambience with elegant interiors.

King-size bed · Sea view · Bath-tub tray on request · Smart TV
Family Suite

Family Room with Sea View

Two double beds and a spacious, well-ventilated layout — ideal for families, with kid-friendly services throughout.

2 double beds · Common pool · Ample storage · Room service
Couples

Couple Room with Pool View

An open patio onto the common pool, with ample space and attentive service — made for two.

Open patio · Common pool · Sofa-cum-bed · Floating breakfast
Sea Facing

Couple Beach View Room

Direct beach views through large windows and a sea-view balcony — bright, airy, and uninterrupted.

Direct beach view · Balcony · Common pool · Mini fridge
In-House Restaurant

Dining at The Seascape

Our in-house restaurant celebrates the rich flavours of authentic Konkani cuisine — traditional recipes, fresh coastal ingredients, and expert technique in every dish, each one reflecting the true essence of the Konkan region.

The kitchen also serves multi-cuisine favourites, and for something unforgettable, a candle-light dinner can be arranged by the sea — soft light, ocean breeze, and curated Konkani delicacies.

Candle-light dinners available on request.

Everything, unhurried

Large Lawn Area

Open green space at the heart of the resort

In-House Restaurant

Candle-Light Dinner

Intimate seaside dining, on request

Wellness & Relaxation

Designed to slow your pace

Family Time

The lawn, the pool, the games room, the long unhurried meals — The Seascape is built as a setting for meaningful family moments.

Candle-Light Dinner

Celebrate love in an intimate seaside setting, where soft candlelight, a gentle ocean breeze, and curated Konkani delicacies make the evening.

Tranquil Environment

Surrounded by serene coastal charm and soothing sea breezes — a peaceful retreat away from the everyday rush.

The Konkan Coast

Revdanda, Korlai & beyond

The Seascape sits on the Revdanda–Murud road at Korlai, on one of India's most underrated coastlines — where the gate quite literally opens onto the sea.

Korlai Fort, Revdanda's Portuguese ruins, Kashid Beach, and Murud–Janjira are each an easy drive away. The Seascape is simply the best place to come back to.
